title: Enter for Your Chance to Win a Free Pass to the Biggest XR Event of the Year
description: AWE USA 2026 is returning to Long Beach, CA on June 15–18. As the event’s Premiere Media Partner, we’re excited to give our readers the opportunity to win one of several free passes. Update (April 27th, 2026): The giveaway closes very soon, don’t miss your last chance to sign up! AWE USA is our ‘must-go’ …

title: VITURE's Widest Field-of-view XR Glasses are Now Available at Amazon & Best Buy
description: XR glasses maker VITURE announced the launch of VITURE Beast, its third-gen flagship XR glasses that release today, priced at $549. Targeting casual content consumption and productivity, the Beast offers up a 3DOF-tracked virtual screen estimated to be 174 inches when viewed at 4 meters, which connects via USB-C to PCs, phones and portable game …

title: Gucci Partners with Google on Luxury Smart Glasses, Reportedly Launching Next Year
description: French luxury group Kering announced it’s working with Google to bring Gucci-branded smart glasses to market sometime next year, potentially becoming the segment’s first luxury brand. Kering, which also owns a host of brands including Yves Saint Laurent, Balenciaga, and Bottega Veneta, has been working to revive Gucci following a sharp decline in revenue—roughly 19–22% …

title: Samsung Reportedly Working on More Advanced Smart Glasses, Possibly Including a Display
description: Samsung is reportedly working on a pair of smart glasses that could be more advanced than its forthcoming competitors to Ray-Ban Meta. Android Authority maintains it’s found evidence of a third pair of smart glasses in the source code of Samsung’s upcoming One UI 9 firmware, revealing a new model number: ‘SM-O500’, code named ‘Haean’. Notably, …

title: 'Forefront' 1.0 Hands-on: The Best 'Battlefield' VR Clone Yet Gets Even Better
description: Forefront has been in early access for only a few months now, although Breachers (2023)  developer Triangle Factory is releasing the game’s 1.0 update on April 23rd, which includes a new map, a few new weapons, class perks, and more. While it’s not a truly massive content drop, Forefront is still one of the best …

title: 'Star Wars' Director Jon Favreau Used Vision Pro in Filming 'Mandalorian & Grogu'
description: Veteran director and writer Jon Favreau revealed he fully integrated Apple Vision Pro into the production pipeline for his upcoming Star Wars film coming out this May, The Mandalorian and Grogu. Speaking to The Town’s Matt Belloni on stage at CinemaCon in Las Vegas this week, Favreau revealed he regularly used Vision Pro while filming The Mandalorian …

title: Apple’s New CEO Has a Background in VR Headsets, But is Reportedly Bearish on Vision Pro
description: Apple announced that CEO Tim Cook is stepping down, and John Ternus, a long-time Apple veteran, is set to take his place. As head of hardware engineering, Ternus oversaw the launch of Vision Pro in addition to a slew of core Apple products over the years, although the new CEO may have some reservations about …

title: 'Microsoft Flight Simulator' PSVR 2 Support Could Arrive as Early as This Week
description: In a Microsoft Flight Simulator’s monthly Developer Stream, Asobo Studio revealed that it could finally release support for PSVR 2 as early as this week. The studio announced last month its ‘Sim 5’ update was coming in April, which is set to bring PSVR 2 support to the PS5 version of the game alongside a …

title: Bigscreen Reveals New Halo Strap Design for 'Beyond 2' PC VR Headset, Shipping Starts in June
description: Bigscreen has revealed a major redesign to Bigscreen Beyond 2’s long-promised halo headstrap mount, which the company says will begin shipping out starting in June. After months of waiting, Bigscreen has finally shown off the long-awaited Halo Mount for Beyond 2 and 2e, its thin and light PC VR headset which shipped in March 2025. …

title: Monkeys Navigate Virtual Worlds Using Thought Alone in New BCI Study
description: University researchers at KU Leuven in Belgium have shown that monkeys can navigate complex virtual environments using a brain-computer interface (BCI) setup, which remarkably involves relatively little user training. As reported in New Scientist, three rhesus macaques were implanted with Utah array BCI devices containing 96 electrodes in each of three brain regions: the primary …

title: Meta is Raising Quest 3 and Quest 3S Prices Amid Memory Cost Surge
description: Meta announced it’s hiking prices for both Quest 3 and Quest 3S headsets, which includes both new and refurbished units, as the company cites the global surge in the price of memory as a main factor. Starting on April 19th, US-based consumers will see both Quest 3S variants (128 GB and 256 GB) bumped up …

title: Snap Confirms Mass Layoffs Ahead of Next-gen 'Specs' AR Glasses Rollout
description: Snap is laying off around 1,000 employees, the Snapchat parent confirmed today. Specs Inc., its recently formed AR glasses subsidiary, is reportedly not being affected, however, as the cuts are aimed at further insulating the traditional Snapchat business from its new AR subsidiary. Spiegel announced the news in an internal memo, published by Business Insider, which …

title: Meta's Reported Plan to Add Facial Recognition to Smart Glasses Slammed by ACLU-led Coalition
description: An ACLU-led coalition representing more than 70 civil liberties advocacy groups are pushing back against Meta’s reported plans to bring facial recognition to its smart glasses. The New York Times initially reported in February that Meta is currently exploring who should be recognizable through its smart glasses, as the company ostensibly hopes to bring some …

title: Blackmagic Unveils VR Camera for Live Immersive Broadcasts, Coming Later This Year for $26K
description: Blackmagic Design unveiled its next VR camera, the URSA Cine Immersive 100G, which is targeting live immersive video production specially for Apple Vision Pro. The new VR camera system pairs dual 8K×8K RGBW sensors with a 100G Ethernet interface, which the company says is designed to handle the bandwidth required for stereoscopic, high–frame rate capture—up to 90 …

title: One of VR's Most Modular Headsets Gets a Little Less Modular Following Key Component Switch
description: Pimax recently announced it was being forced to change a key component in all Crystal Super PC VR headsets and display accessories moving forward, effectively making one of VR’s most modular headsets decidedly less so. The News Crystal Super is renowned for being highly modular thanks to its ability to swap optical engines, which includes …
